description: LeadFuze is a lead generation platform giving sales, marketing, and recruiting teams access to 300M+ verified professional profiles with emails, phone numbers, and social data.
tagline: Automated lead list building for sales, marketing, and recruiting
overview: LeadFuze gives sales, marketing, and recruiting professionals a monthly-refreshed database of over 300 million verified contacts, complete with emails, phone numbers, and social profiles. Its AI-driven list-building automation cuts manual prospecting time and connects directly with popular CRMs and email tools.
what_is: LeadFuze is a lead generation platform built for sales, marketing, and recruiting professionals who need accurate, targeted contact data at scale. It provides access to more than 300 million verified professional profiles, each carrying detailed information such as email addresses, phone numbers, and addresses. The database is refreshed monthly, which keeps the data current and reduces the time teams spend chasing bounced contacts or outdated records.

Where LeadFuze stands out is in how quickly users can move from search to a ready-to-use prospect list. Hyper-targeted search filters let you define exactly who you want to reach, and the built-in automation handles list assembly without manual effort. Sales pipelines, marketing campaigns, and candidate sourcing workflows all benefit from this speed, allowing outreach to begin almost immediately after setting up a search.

LeadFuze is designed to serve as the data foundation in an existing go-to-market stack. It integrates with CRMs and email platforms so enriched contacts flow directly into the tools teams already use for outreach and follow-up. It is not a CRM or email marketing platform itself, making it the right fit for teams that have outreach infrastructure in place and need reliable, clean prospect data to power it.
